message:
feat: add 85K+ contributions stat and agent subscription context

Replace "Years Building AI" hero stat with "Contributions (1yr): 85K+"
which is far more impactful. Add context about 52+ AI agent
subscriptions (~$12K/mo) to both the stat helper text and the hero
body paragraph. The vast majority of contributions landed since
January 2026.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
